scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @dealernet-ops/core && npm run build -w @dealernet-ops/db
scripts.db:up:wait: npm run db:up && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/wait-for-postgres.ps1
scripts.job:ingest-offers: npm run build:packages && npm run job:ingest-offers -w @dealernet-ops/worker
scripts.job:poll-messages: npm run build:packages && npm run job:poll-messages -w @dealernet-ops/worker
scripts.job:probe-offer: npm run build:packages && node --env-file=apps/worker/.env --import tsx apps/worker/src/jobs/probe-offer.ts
scripts.job:export-upc-tiers: npm run build:packages && node --env-file=apps/worker/.env --import tsx apps/worker/src/jobs/export-upc-tiers.ts
scripts.job:report-purchases: npm run build:packages && npm run job:report-purchases -w @dealernet-ops/worker
scripts.job:update-purchase-tracking: npm run build:packages && npm run job:update-purchase-tracking -w @dealernet-ops/worker --
scripts.job:sync-offers: npm run build:packages && npm run job:sync-offers -w @dealernet-ops/worker --
scripts.job:auto-sync-accepted: npm run build:packages && npm run job:auto-sync-accepted -w @dealernet-ops/worker
scripts.job:dealernet-cycle: npm run job:ingest-offers && npm run job:poll-messages && npm run job:auto-sync-accepted
scripts.job:vending-reconcile: npm run build:packages && node --env-file=apps/worker/.env --import tsx apps/worker/src/jobs/vending-reconcile.ts
